rawTranscript: OneVoice 1.2 makes every recording easy to replay, search, and continue on my Mac.
transcript: OneVoice 1.2 makes every recording easy to replay, search, and continue on my Mac.
title: Launch notes for OneVoice 1.2

rawTranscript: The clearest product promise is simple: speak once, find it later, and keep the audio private.
transcript: The clearest product promise is simple: speak once, find it later, and keep the audio private.
title: Weekly product review

rawTranscript: People want a recorder they can trust when they switch apps, without sending a meeting to somebody else's server.
transcript: People want a recorder they can trust when they switch apps, without sending a meeting to somebody else's server.
title: Interview highlights

rawTranscript: Mei suggested putting search first and showing the transcript beside every recording.
transcript: Mei suggested putting search first and showing the transcript beside every recording.
title: Coffee chat with Mei

rawTranscript: A quiet idea is easier to keep when recording takes one tap and works from the lock screen.

title: Ideas while walking
